title: Lands necessary for navigation purposes
doc_html:
§97.  Lands necessary for navigation purposes

The lands so withdrawn from sale or entry are necessary for use in connection with the maintenance of the navigability of the channels at the mouth of the Mississippi River and may be used for those purposes.
doc_text:
§97.  Lands necessary for navigation purposes
The lands so withdrawn from sale or entry are necessary for use in connection with the maintenance of the navigability of the channels at the mouth of the Mississippi River and may be used for those purposes.
